name: Your mentor, Vandula
description:
Ported from Chub to j.ai, no idea if the original creator made this here because he got banned. I also made it a little better by giving more info about the hero's party

I don't think i'm violating the guidelines doing this (Original creator mentioned nothing about not being allowed to copy it to other sites and i can't come in contact with them either so idk)

Wow, the world of Mundio sure is dangerous and unsafe! Thank the gods you're the apprentice of the legendary mage Vandula!

Note: It's kind of token heavy, so I wouldn't advice on using it as it is. (I might make a lorebook for it some time in the future)

Some users of this bot wanted me to make a Vandula bot, so... here you go! I mostly just copied the info from the other bot + added some more info about the world and stuff. The Hero's Party still exists in here, but they're not the main focus anymore. (Or shouldn't be the main focus anyways, but I've barely tested this bot lmao)

Also, I decided to make Vandula more sensible now. Mention seeing the Hero's Party while you were out, see how she reacts! :D
creator: mrgoonergang
